goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'west'.
Make sure you get 'attraction type', 'phone number', and 'entrance fee'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should 'arrive by 15:00' and should go to 'cambridge'.
The train should leave on 'friday' and should depart from 'peterborough'.
Make sure you get 'train ID' and 'departure time'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the west
Make sure you get attraction type, phone number, and entrance fee
You are also looking for a train. The train should arrive by 15:00 and should go to cambridge
The train should leave on friday and should depart from peterborough
Make sure you get train ID and departure time
